name: Steamed Spareribs with Black Bean Sauce (Dow See Jing Pie)
recipeInstructions:
1. Have a butcher cut spareribs into 1-inch pieces and trim off excess fat.
2. Place the spareribs in a heat-proof dish.
3. Wash and rinse black beans 2 or 3 times, then mash them with minced garlic, ginger, dark soy sauce, cornstarch, and sherry until smooth.
4. Mix the mashed black bean mixture with the spareribs.
5. Place the heat-proof dish on a steaming rack in a wok. Add water to the bottom of the wok.
6. Cover and steam for 30 minutes.
Yield: 4 servings
